temporal_description:
The audio features an upbeat and energetic pop-punk or alternative rock song. A driving, fast-paced drum beat and a prominent, slightly distorted electric guitar riff create a feeling of momentum and excitement. A male vocalist sings with a clear, enthusiastic, and high-energy tone, delivering the lyrics, "me and F, I go around with you. You know that I can..." The overall mood of the music is lively and full of youthful energy.

The video opens with a rear view of a vintage-style, orange Volkswagen van driving down a city street. The van is heavily loaded with items, including a large, patterned object strapped to its roof and a large, round, woven basket on the back. The street is lined with parked cars, including a white van and a red car, and is flanked by tall, leafy trees. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of either sunrise or sunset, creating a calm and pleasant atmosphere. The camera is positioned behind the van, following its movement down the road.

The perspective shifts to a point-of-view shot from a moving vehicle, looking down a winding country road. The road curves gently to the left, with a metal guardrail on the right side. The landscape is lush and green, with dense trees and foliage lining the road under a partly cloudy sky. In the distance, another vehicle can be seen approaching on the road. The camera remains steady, capturing the motion of the drive.

The final scene shows a man in a business suit, consisting of a dark blazer, white shirt, and red tie, pedaling a bicycle. He is riding on the shoulder of a paved road that curves through a hilly, rural landscape. In the background, rolling green hills and a clear blue sky are visible. The camera is positioned low and to the side of the man, capturing his determined expression as he pedals. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting it is handheld and following his movement.
